# NadirClaw

> Open-source LLM router that automatically routes simple prompts to cheaper models. Save 40-70% on LLM API costs without changing a line of code.

NadirClaw is an open-source, drop-in LLM proxy that sits between your application and LLM providers. It analyzes prompt complexity in real-time and routes simple requests (heartbeats, status checks, simple Q&A) to cheaper models while keeping complex tasks (code generation, reasoning) on premium models like Claude Opus or GPT-4. It works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and any OpenAI-compatible client.

## Key Features

- Automatic prompt complexity analysis and model routing
- Drop-in proxy: no code changes required, just point your base URL
- Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and OpenAI-compatible tools
- Real-time cost tracking and observability dashboard
- Configurable routing rules and model tiers
- Self-hosted: runs on your infrastructure, zero telemetry

## Installation

pip install nadirclaw

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://getnadir.com): Product overview, cost calculator, and quick start

- [OpenClaw Integration](https://getnadir.com/openclaw.html): Using NadirClaw with autonomous multi-agent setups
